---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible — include UI behavior, API changes, or data model changes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

- Mockups, wireframes, or screenshots
- Links to similar features in other tools
- Related issues or PRs
